final_prompt.prompt:
Create an instructional infographic showing how to deploy Hermes in a Docker container and integrate it with GLMCodingPlan.

Style/medium: needs a clean technical documentation aesthetic — exact visual style is yours
Composition: must be a clear 4-step numbered layout (1-2-3-4), each step with its own visual panel
Subject: must include Docker container deployment process and GLMCodingPlan integration workflow
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: needs a clear readable direction for technical diagrams — exact color choices are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include step labels "1", "2", "3", "4", must include "Hermes", must include "Docker", must include "GLMCodingPlan"
Constraints: must show 4 distinct sequential steps, must preserve technical accuracy of container deployment workflow
Avoid:
